data.title: Here’s how Donald Trump’s crypto portfolio performed in Q1 2025
data.description:
President Donald Trump’s cryptocurrency portfolio took a massive hit in the first quarter of 2025, aligning with broader market trends.
source: https://finbold.com/heres-how-donald-trumps-crypto-portfolio-performed-in-q1-2025/

data.title: Ethereum Has Outperformed Bitcoin Only 15% of the Time Since Launch, Analysts Say
data.description:
Since Ethereum’s launch in 2015, it has only outperformed Bitcoin on 15% of trading days, according to data shared by analysts.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/ethereum-has-outperformed-bitcoin-only-15-of-the-time/

data.title: Binance HODLer Airdrop Lists Babylon (BABY) and Offers Airdrop Rewards
data.description: According to the official announcement, Binance will launch Babylon (BABY) at 18:00 (Beijing time) on April 10, 2025, and open BABY/USDT, BABY/USDC, BABY/BNB, BABY/FDUSD and BABY/TRY trading pairs. In addition, Binance will provide BABY airdrop rewards to users who use BNB to subscribe for coin-earning products between 08:00 (Beijing time) on March 7, 2025 and 07:59 (Beijing time) on March 13, 2025. The airdrop information is expected to be announced within 12 hours, and the new tokens will be distributed to users' spot wallets at least 1 hour before the start of trading. (This newsletter is generated with the assistance of AI)

data.title: Binance will adjust the settlement frequency of VIDT perpetual contract funding rate
data.description: According to the official announcement, Binance Futures will adjust the funding rate settlement frequency of the USDⓈ-MVIDTUSDT perpetual contract from every four hours to every two hours starting at 10:00 (UTC) on April 9, 2025. (This newsletter is generated by AI)

data.title: Spot Gold Surges Over $12, Breaks $3030 Per Ounce
data.description: According to Odaily, market data indicates that spot gold has experienced a short-term increase of $12, surpassing $3030 per ounce. The daily rise amounts to 1.69%.

data.title: Hong Kong Stocks Rebound as Chip Sector Strengthens
data.description: According to Odaily, Hong Kong stocks experienced a recovery after a weak start, with the Hang Seng Index turning positive in the afternoon session. Initially, the index had dropped by over 4%. The Hang Seng Tech Index saw an increase of more than 2%, driven by gains in the chip sector. Semiconductor Manufacturing International Corporation (00981.HK) rose nearly 11%, while Hua Hong Semiconductor (01347.HK) gained over 7%.

data.title: Global Trade Tensions Rise as Trump's Tariffs Take Effect
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, U.S. President Donald Trump's reciprocal tariffs on dozens of countries have officially come into effect, heightening concerns about a global trade war. Despite his willingness to negotiate with some nations, these punitive tariffs have disrupted the longstanding global trade order, sparking fears of an economic downturn and causing significant declines in global stock markets.

Since Trump announced the tariffs a week ago, the S&P 500 index has lost nearly $6 trillion in value, marking the largest four-day drop since the index was established in the 1950s. The index is now approaching bear market territory, defined as a 20% decline from recent highs. After a brief respite, Asian markets resumed their sell-off on Wednesday, with Japan's Nikkei index falling over 3% and South Korea's KOSPI index dropping more than 1% during the day.

data.title: Aave's Initial Buyback Proposal Receives Overwhelming Approval
data.description: According to PANews, Aave's official governance page has announced the approval of the first phase of its buyback proposal with a 99.63% support rate. The Aave Treasury Committee has been authorized to use $4 million in aEthUSDT for approximately one month of AAVE buybacks. This initiative is part of the Aavenomics economic model, aiming for a complete buyback target of $1 million per week over the next six months. The initial phase will be followed by the deployment of an updated Aave Swapper contract to support long-term execution.

data.title: Bounce Brand: Yayoi Kusama's RWA Pumpkin Art Auction Has Started
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to Bounce Brand, the auction of Yayoi Kusama's RWA pumpkin art has begun. Users only need to bid 5 AUCTION to have a chance to win this pumpkin worth more than $137,000. In addition, the auction draw for BB and 3Ef pledges will begin after the auction ends.

data.title: CryptoQuant: 7,500 Bitcoin long positions closed on April 6
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to CryptoQuant analyst Darkfost, the largest Bitcoin long position liquidation event since this bull market occurred on April 6, with about 7,500 Bitcoin long positions liquidated on that day. This is the largest single-day long position liquidation record in this bull market, mainly due to the intensified market volatility caused by Trump's economic policies, especially tariff-related uncertainties. Darkfost reminds investors to be cautious during periods of rising volatility and focus on protecting the safety of funds.
